title: Soft Cotton Skein Set
shortDescription: Five soft cotton skeins for crochet, weaving, and small handmade goods.
longDescription: A compact yarn bundle for clean craft work, color sampling, and small-batch handmade items.

title: Chunky Wool Bundle
shortDescription: Thicker wool yarn for blankets, scarves, and sculptural textile pieces.
longDescription: A warm chunky wool bundle built for larger stitches, visible texture, and fast handmade output.

title: Natural Dye Mini Pack
shortDescription: Small naturally dyed yarn balls for color studies and sample work.
longDescription: A small palette of naturally dyed yarns for testing fiber color, contrast, and handmade product direction.

title: Crochet Starter Kit
shortDescription: Yarn, hook, and pattern cards for quick beginner crochet projects.
longDescription: A ready-to-use crochet kit with simple materials and enough structure to make the first project feel approachable.

title: Textile Color Library
shortDescription: A broader yarn palette for planning collections and textile layouts.
longDescription: A color library for makers who need yarn options to compare, group, and plan before committing to production.

title: Custom Social Avatar
shortDescription: A custom digital avatar for profile images, communities, and creator pages.
longDescription: A clean, export-ready avatar package with multiple crops for social profiles and creator storefronts.

title: Printable Character Poster
shortDescription: A high-resolution illustrated poster file for printing at home or locally.
longDescription: A polished character poster package prepared for clean print output and digital sharing.

title: Brand Icon Pack
shortDescription: Five custom digital icons for brands, apps, and small shops.
longDescription: A compact icon system for storefronts, landing pages, and creator brands that need a consistent visual set.

title: Album Cover Concept
shortDescription: A square digital cover concept for music, podcasts, or visual campaigns.
longDescription: A mood-forward cover image prepared for streaming platforms, social posts, and campaign previews.

title: Animated Sticker Set
shortDescription: A five-piece digital sticker set for streams, chats, and creator posts.
longDescription: A playful digital sticker pack with clean exports for messaging, creator communities, and lightweight motion use.

title: Origami Wall Cluster
shortDescription: A folded paper wall cluster with sculptural depth and light shadow.
longDescription: A wall-ready origami cluster that adds shape and depth without making the room feel visually heavy.

title: Paper Mache Shelf Object
shortDescription: A textured handmade object sized for shelves, desks, and small displays.
longDescription: A paper mache display object with a tactile finish and a simple silhouette for small interior setups.

title: Mini Framed Print Pair
shortDescription: Two small framed prints for desks, narrow walls, and layered shelves.
longDescription: A compact print pair made for small spaces where wall and desk surfaces need coordinated artwork.

title: Desk Totem Sculpture
shortDescription: A small sculptural desk object designed to sit beside tools and monitors.
longDescription: A vertical desk sculpture with enough presence to anchor a work surface without taking up much room.

title: Folded Paper Mobile
shortDescription: A hanging folded-paper mobile for wall corners and quiet desk spaces.
longDescription: A lightweight folded-paper mobile designed to bring movement and craft detail to small interior zones.
